title: Evidence Revision Profile
promise: How firmly do you hold beliefs — and what would change them? Four axes of the tension between conviction and openness, inspired by actively open-minded thinking.
description: 12 statements, each with a dual response: rate agreement (5-point Likert), then state what would change your mind (4 revision conditions). Custom scoring maps four axes — Conviction Strength, Revision Openness, Evidence Sensitivity, Value Anchoring — and the conviction-vs-openness tension, without judging whether you are too rigid or too flexible.
ogDescription: What would actually change your mind? 24 dual-response items, ~5 min. Private by design.
